themes.label: Grace/Mercy
themes.summary: This chapter highlights undeserved favor, mercy, forgiveness, compassion, or pardon. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "The cry for mercy intensifies: 'Have mercy upon us, O LORD, have mercy upon us: for we are ex...". Cross references echo "Grace".

themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "The psalm opens with eyes lifted heavenward: 'Unto thee lift I up mine eyes, O thou that dwel...".
